choose.when:
WITH USER_STD AS ( SELECT STD_ID, SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = 'USR000000078' ) SELECT A.* , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.SEND_START_DTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SEND_START_DTTM AND A.EDTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() > A.EDTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS PROGRESS FROM ( SELECT A.ASMT_ID , A.ASMT_CTGRCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMT_CTGRCD' AND CD = A.ASMT_CTGRCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_CTGR_NM , A.ASMT_TTL , A.ASMNT_OPEN_YN , A.SEND_START_DTTM , A.SEND_END_DTTM , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN , A.EXT_SEND_DTTM , A.PRTC_YN , A.MRK_OYN , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , CASE WHEN A.EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN = 'Y' AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND A.EXT_SEND_DTTM > A.SEND_END_DTTM THEN A.EXT_SEND_DTTM ELSE A.SEND_END_DTTM END AS EDTTM , CASE WHEN A.EVL_CTGRCD = 'R' THEN (SELECT ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND LINK_CD = B.ASMT_ID) ELSE NULL END AS ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID
, CASE WHEN C.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN
FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} LEFT JOIN USER_STD U ON B.SBJCT_ID = U.SBJCT_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN C ON A.ASMT_ID = C.ASMT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.STD_ID = U.STD_ID AND UPPER(SBMSN_STSCD) IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE')
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.IND_YN = 'N' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID )
AND LOWER(A.ASMT_TTL) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%'))
AND FN_DTTM() >= A.SEND_START_DTTM
) A ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

SELECT A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_TYCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'DSCS_TYCD' AND CD = A.DSCS_TYCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS FORUM_CTGR_NM , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_RFLTRT , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.MRK_OYN , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.DSCS_SDTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.DSCS_SDTTM AND A.DSCS_EDTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() > A.DSCS_EDTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS PROGRESS , CASE WHEN A.EVL_CTGRCD = 'R' THEN (SELECT ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID FROM TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND LINK_CD = B.DSCS_ID) ELSE NULL END AS ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID
, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND STD_ID = (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId}) ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND STD_ID = (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId}) ) != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN
FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID )
AND LOWER(A.DSCS_TTL) LIKE LOWER('%' ||#{searchValue} || '%')
AND FN_DTTM() >= A.DSCS_SDTTM
ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

WITH USER_STD AS ( SELECT STD_ID, SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) SELECT A.EXAM_ID, A.EXAM_TYCD, A.EXAM_TTL, A.EXAM_SDTTM, A.EXAM_EDTTM, A.MRK_RFLTYN, A.MRK_RFLTRT, A.MRK_OYN, A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'EXAM_STARE_UNI_CD' AND CD = A.TKEXAM_TYCD) AS EXAM_STARE_TYPE_NM, CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.EXAM_SDTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.EXAM_SDTTM AND A.EXAM_EDTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() > A.EXAM_EDTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS PROGRESS
, CASE WHEN C.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN
FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
LEFT JOIN USER_STD U ON B.SBJCT_ID = U.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C ON A.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.STD_ID = U.STD_ID AND C.STARE_CNT > 0
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A'
AND LOWER(A.EXAM_TTL) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{searchValue} || '%')
AND FN_DTTM() >= A.EXAM_SDTTM AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

WITH USER_STD AS ( SELECT STD_ID, SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) SELECT A.EXAM_ID, A.EXAM_TYCD, A.EXAM_TTL, A.EXAM_SDTTM, A.EXAM_EDTTM, A.MRK_RFLTYN, A.MRK_RFLTRT, A.MRK_OYN, A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'EXAM_STARE_UNI_CD' AND CD = A.TKEXAM_TYCD) AS EXAM_STARE_TYPE_NM, CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.EXAM_SDTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.EXAM_SDTTM AND A.EXAM_EDTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() > A.EXAM_EDTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS PROGRESS
, CASE WHEN C.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN
FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
LEFT JOIN USER_STD U ON B.SBJCT_ID = U.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C ON A.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.STD_ID = U.STD_ID AND C.STARE_CNT > 0
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A'
AND LOWER(A.EXAM_TTL) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{searchValue} || '%')
AND FN_DTTM() >= A.EXAM_SDTTM AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M')
ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

WITH USER_STD AS ( SELECT STD_ID, SBJCT_ID, USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) SELECT A.SRVY_ID, A.SRVY_TTL, A.SRVY_SDTTM, A.RESCH_END_DTTM, A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, A.MRK_RFLTYN, A.MRK_RFLTRT, A.MRK_OYN, CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.SRVY_SDTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SRVY_SDTTM AND A.RESCH_END_DTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() >= A.RESCH_END_DTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS PROGRESS
, CASE WHEN C.SRVY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOIN_YN
FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
LEFT JOIN USER_STD U ON B.SBJCT_ID = U.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP C ON A.SRVY_ID = C.SRVY_ID AND C.STD_ID = U.STD_ID AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND SRVY_ID = C.SRVY_ID )
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SRVY_TMPLTYN = 'N' AND A.SRVY_TYCD = 'LECT'
AND LOWER(A.SRVY_TTL) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{searchValue} || '%')
AND FN_DTTM() >= A.SRVY_SDTTM AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.countEvalCriteria 설 명 : 평가기준 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) A
/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listEvalCriteria 설 명 : 평가기준 목록 */
/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listEvalCriteriaPaging 설 명 : 평가기준 목록 페이징 */

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listEvalCriteriaScoreAppyY 설 명 : 평가기준 성적반영비율 대상 */ SELECT A.* FROM (
) A WHERE A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.selectCrsHomeProfElementStatus 설 명 : 강의실 교수 홈 학습요소 상태 */ SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'ASMNT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS ASMNT_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'PRCT_ASMNT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS PRCT_ASMNT_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'INS_EXAM' THEN CNT END), 0) AS INS_EXAM_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'FORUM' THEN CNT END), 0) AS FORUM_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'QUIZ' THEN CNT END), 0) AS QUIZ_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'RESCH' THEN CNT END), 0) AS RESCH_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'SEMINAR' THEN CNT END), 0) AS SEMINAR_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'EXAM_ABSENT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS EXAM_ABSENT_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'EXAM_ABSENT_APPROVE' THEN CNT END), 0) AS EXAM_ABSENT_APPROVE_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'EXAM_DSBL_REQ' THEN CNT END), 0) AS EXAM_DSBL_REQ_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'EXAM_DSBL_REQ_APPROVE' THEN CNT END), 0) AS EXAM_DSBL_REQ_APPROVE_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'SCORE_OBJT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS SCORE_OBJT_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'SCORE_OBJT_PROC' THEN CNT END), 0) AS SCORE_OBJT_PROC_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'STD_CNT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS STD_CNT , NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN GBN = 'STD_RISK_CNT' THEN CNT END), 0) AS STD_RISK_CNT FROM ( -- 과제 SELECT 'ASMNT' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID ) -- 실기과제 UNION ALL SELECT 'PRCT_ASMNT' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.PRTC_YN = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID ) -- 시험 UNION ALL SELECT 'INS_EXAM' AS GBN , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD != 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_TYCD != 'ETC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD IN ('M', 'L') AND A.EXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL -- 토론 UNION ALL SELECT 'FORUM' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) -- 퀴즈 UNION ALL SELECT 'QUIZ' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID ) -- 설문 UNION ALL SELECT 'RESCH' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND A.SRVY_TMPLTYN = 'N' -- 세미나 UNION ALL SELECT 'SEMINAR' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} -- 결시원 UNION ALL SELECT Z.GBN , COUNT(Z.GBN) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.EXAM_ID, A.STD_ID ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS RN , 'EXAM_ABSENT' AS GBN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' )) Z WHERE Z.RN = 1 GROUP BY Z.GBN -- 결시원 승인 UNION ALL SELECT Z.GBN , SUM(CASE WHEN Z.APRV_STSCD IN ('APPROVE', 'COMPANION') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.EXAM_ID, A.STD_ID ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS RN , 'EXAM_ABSENT_APPROVE' AS GBN , A.APRV_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' AND (A.APRV_STSCD = 'APPLICATE' OR A.APRV_STSCD = 'RAPPLICATE' OR A.APRV_STSCD = 'APPROVE' OR A.APRV_STSCD = 'COMPANION') )) Z WHERE Z.RN = 1 GROUP BY Z.GBN -- 장애인 지원 UNION ALL SELECT 'EXAM_DSBL_REQ' AS GBN -- , SUM(IF(C.MID_EXAM_YN = 'Y', 1, 0)) + SUM(IF(C.LAST_EXAM_YN = 'Y', 1, 0)) AS CNT , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN ( SELECT AA.SBJCT_ID -- , IFNULL(MAX(IF(CC.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL, 'Y', NULL)), 'N') AS MID_EXAM_YN -- , IFNULL(MAX(IF(DD.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL, 'Y', NULL)), 'N') AS LAST_EXAM_YN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.SBJCT_ID = BB.SBJCT_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC CC ON BB.EXAM_ID = CC.EXAM_ID AND CC.DELYN = 'N' AND CC.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND CC.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND CC.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'MIDDLE_TEST' AND MRK_RFLTRT >0 AND SBJCT_ID = AA.SBJCT_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC DD ON BB.EXAM_ID = DD.EXAM_ID AND DD.DELYN = 'N' AND DD.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DD.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND DD.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'LAST_TEST' AND MRK_RFLTRT >0 AND SBJCT_ID = AA.SBJCT_ID) WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY AA.SBJCT_ID ) C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.DISABLILITY_YN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD = 'Y' -- 장애인 지원 승인 UNION ALL SELECT 'EXAM_DSBL_REQ_APPROVE' AS GBN -- , SUM(IF(C.MID_EXAM_YN = 'Y' AND D.MID_APPR_STAT IN('APPROVE', 'COMPANION'), 1, 0)) -- + SUM(IF(C.LAST_EXAM_YN = 'Y' AND D.APRV_STSCD IN('APPROVE', 'COMPANION'), 1, 0)) AS CNT , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN ( SELECT AA.SBJCT_ID -- , IFNULL(MAX(IF(CC.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL, 'Y', NULL)), 'N') AS MID_EXAM_YN -- , IFNULL(MAX(IF(DD.EXAM_ID IS NOT NULL, 'Y', NULL)), 'N') AS LAST_EXAM_YN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN BB ON AA.SBJCT_ID = BB.SBJCT_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC CC ON BB.EXAM_ID = CC.EXAM_ID AND CC.DELYN = 'N' AND CC.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND CC.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND CC.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'MIDDLE_TEST' AND MRK_RFLTRT >0 AND SBJCT_ID = AA.SBJCT_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC DD ON BB.EXAM_ID = DD.EXAM_ID AND DD.DELYN = 'N' AND DD.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DD.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND DD.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'LAST_TEST' AND MRK_RFLTRT >0 AND SBJCT_ID = AA.SBJCT_ID) WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY AA.SBJCT_ID ) C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY D ON B.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID AND B.STD_ID = D.STD_ID WHERE A.DISABLILITY_YN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD = 'Y' -- 이의신청 UNION ALL SELECT 'SCORE_OBJT' AS GBN , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' ) -- 이의신청 처리 UNION ALL SELECT 'SCORE_OBJT_PROC' AS GBN , SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHG_PROC_CD IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CNT FROM MRK_OBJCT_APLY A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' ) -- 학생 수 UNION ALL SELECT 'STD_CNT' , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' -- 이수위험 학생수 UNION ALL SELECT 'STD_RISK_CNT' , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON A.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_LRN_STOP_RISK_IDX E ON D.SBJCT_ID = E.PSTG_YR AND D.CRS_ID = E.PSTG_SMSTR AND A.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND E.RISK_GRDCD IN ('위험', '매우위험') WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' ) A

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listCrsHomeExam 설 명 : 강의실 홈 주차 시험 목록 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_TTL , A.EXAM_TYCD , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , A.EXAM_SDTTM , A.EXAM_EDTTM , A.TKEXAM_MNTS , CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXAM_ABSENT_APPROVE_YN , C.EXAM_ID AS EXAM_QUIZ_CD , C.EXAM_TTL AS EXAM_QUIZ_TITLE , C.EXAM_SDTTM AS EXAM_QUIZ_START_DTTM , C.EXAM_EDTTM AS EXAM_QUIZ_END_DTTM , C.MRK_OYN AS EXAM_QUIZ_SCORE_OPEN_YN , C.TKEXAM_MNTS AS EXAM_QUIZ_EXAM_STARE_TM , D.ASMT_ID AS EXAM_ASMNT_CD , D.ASMT_TTL AS EXAM_ASMNT_TITLE , D.SEND_START_DTTM AS EXAM_ASMNT_SEND_START_DTTM , D.SEND_END_DTTM AS EXAM_ASMNT_SEND_END_DTTM , D.MRK_OYN AS EXAM_ASMNT_SCORE_OPEN_YN , E.DSCS_ID AS EXAM_FORUM_CD , E.DSCS_TTL AS EXAM_FORUM_TITLE , E.DSCS_SDTTM AS EXAM_FORUM_START_DTTM , E.DSCS_EDTTM AS EXAM_FORUM_END_DTTM , E.MRK_OYN AS EXAM_FORUM_SCORE_OPEN_YN -- 결시원 신청기간 여부 , NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN AA.SYSJOB_SCHDL_SYMD AND AA.SYSJOB_SCHDL_EYMD THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_SYSJOB_SCHDL AA WHERE AA.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND AA.SYSJOB_SCHDL_TYCD = '00190904' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DGRS_YR = TERM_T.DGRS_YR AND AA.DGRS_SMSTR = TERM_T.DGRS_SMSTR ), 'N') AS EXAM_ABSENT_PERIOD_YN , NVL(( SELECT MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_TYCD = CASE WHEN A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' THEN 'MIDDLE_TEST' WHEN A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' THEN 'LAST_TEST' END ), 0) AS MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN CRS_SMSTR TERM_T ON TERM_T.CRS_SMSTR_ID = (SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) AND TERM_T.ORG_ID = #{orgId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT D ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = D.ASMT_ID AND D.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS E ON A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = E.DSCS_ID AND E.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M') AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD IN ('M', 'L')

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listCrsHomeAExam 설 명 : 강의실 홈 주차 상시시험 목록 */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.EXAM_ID , B.EXAM_TYCD , B.TKEXAM_TYCD , B.EXAM_TTL , B.EXAM_SDTTM , B.EXAM_EDTTM FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.GROUP_SEQ ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) AS RN , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_EYMD < A.LCTR_SYMD AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) + 1 AS GROUP_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A ) A WHERE A.RN = 1 ) A JOIN ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_TYCD , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , A.EXAM_TTL , A.EXAM_SDTTM , A.EXAM_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' ) B
ON SUBSTR(B.EXAM_SDTTM, 1, 8) BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD ORDER BY B.EXAM_SDTTM

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listCrsHomeForum 설 명 : 강의실 홈 주차 토론 목록 */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.MRK_OYN FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.DSCS_ID , B.DSCS_TTL , B.DSCS_SDTTM , B.DSCS_EDTTM , B.MRK_OYN , B.FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.GROUP_SEQ ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) AS RN , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_EYMD < A.LCTR_SYMD AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) + 1 AS GROUP_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A ) A WHERE A.RN = 1 ) A JOIN ( SELECT A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.MRK_OYN , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID IS NULL -- 대체시험 제외 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) ) B
ON SUBSTR(B.DSCS_SDTTM, 1, 8) BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD UNION ALL SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.MRK_OYN , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID IS NOT NULL -- 대체시험 제외 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) ) A ORDER BY A.DSCS_SDTTM, A.FRST_INQ_DTTM

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.listCrsHomeSeminar 설 명 : 강의실 홈 주차 세미나 목록 */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , B.SMNR_ID , B.SEMINAR_NM , B.SMNR_CTGRCD , B.SMNR_MNTS , B.SMNR_SDTTM , B.SMNR_EDTTM FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.GROUP_SEQ ORDER BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) AS RN , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD FROM ( SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_EYMD < A.LCTR_SYMD AND SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) + 1 AS GROUP_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A ) A WHERE A.RN = 1 ) A JOIN ( SELECT A.SMNR_ID , A.SEMINAR_NM , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.SMNR_CTGRCD , A.SMNR_MNTS , A.SMNR_SDTTM , A.SMNR_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) B ON (
SUBSTR(B.SMNR_SDTTM, 1, 8) BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD OR A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ) ORDER BY B.SMNR_SDTTM

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeDAO.crsHomeCurrentWeek 설 명 : 강의실 홈 현재 주차 */ SELECT MIN(A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MIN , MAX(A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MAX , MIN(A.LCTR_SYMD) AS LESSON_START_DT_MIN , MAX(A.LCTR_EYMD) AS LESSON_END_DT_MAX FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
